CustomField.description: Set when the discretionary short-circuit auto-approved this request (quoted hours at/under DeliveryHubSettings__c.DiscretionaryThresholdHoursNumber__c with monthly cap headroom). Null = the decision was human. THIS_MONTH sums over this field meter the consumed slice of DiscretionaryMonthlyCapHoursNumber__c. DateTime-not-checkbox per repo convention.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: When this request was auto-approved under the discretionary threshold. Blank = human decision.
CustomField.label: Auto-Approved
